title: General ScreenshotsMCP agent harness rubric

dimensions.description: Required run artifacts exist and are readable.
The first response includes the required workflow, scope, or planning signals.
The first response avoids known-bad blocking or unsafe patterns.
Tool choices align with the task-specific harness expectations.

notes: Measured evidence and evaluator notes should remain separate.
Optional manual review can be layered on later without changing the base manifest format.
